description: is1PEventLoggingEnabled (Na) gates the 1P OTEL event sink (logEventTo1P, logGrowthBookExperimentTo1P). Force false so the OpenTelemetry pipeline that ships claude-code events to Anthropic's 1P ingest is disabled regardless of A46() value.

patches.description: Force Na() → false, disabling 1P OTEL event sink

note: Legacy minified fn name (A46/Na). Behavior covered by env telemetry=0 via install-rules.
